subject: Re: ERP Project Timeline Adjustment
body: Hello, due to internal restructuring, the ERP project review meeting needs to be postponed to mid-May, when the new CTO will participate in the final decision. Also, the budget may need to be re-approved.

subject: Logistics Platform Bidding Results
body: Your proposal has made it to the final two candidates. However, the competitor's quote is 15% lower than yours, and they promise a 3-month delivery. Can you adjust your pricing and delivery timeline? We will make our final decision before April 5.

subject: Smart Factory Project Update - Urgent
body: Urgent notice: Our CFO has raised concerns about the project ROI, arguing that the 2M investment would take at least 3 years to break even, and prefers a phased approach. Additionally, the company has launched a cost-cutting initiative, and all projects over 1M require direct CEO approval. Please prepare a detailed ROI analysis.

subject: Online Learning Platform Launch Feedback
body: The platform is running smoothly and feedback from teachers and students has been positive. We may consider expanding to other campuses next semester. Thank you for the team's support!

subject: Property Sales System Requirements Discussion
body: We are interested in your property sales system, but our group is currently evaluating whether to build an in-house IT team. If we decide to outsource, the tender process is expected to start in Q3.
